modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error message in ILLiad Docline prevents receiving requests

full_description_text: 
El usuario está recibiendo un mensaje de error en ILLiad Docline. Dice "Lua Script Error" y no puede recibir solicitudes. Esto está causando problemas en su trabajo.
short_description: Error message in ILLiad Docline prevents receiving requests
description: El usuario está recibiendo un mensaje de error en ILLiad Docline. Dice "Lua Script Error" y no puede recibir solicitudes. Esto está causando problemas en su trabajo.
